## Waived (2)

| v1 id | note |
|---|---|
| m1-u4-days-of-week | Lexical set (the seven day names + capitalisation), not a MORE! 1 SB GRAMMAR box. The only grammatical content — on + day — is taught in the unit-12 Time prepositions box (structure prepositions-time). |
| m1-u9-frequency-expressions | Lexical/usage point (once/twice/three times a week, every + day). No dedicated SB GRAMMAR box: the unit-9 box covers question words, object pronouns and possessive 's. Distinct from the adverbs-of-frequency structure (always/usually/never), so not folded in. |
